name: bernstein
description: Audit-grade multi-agent orchestration for CLI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, +40 more). HMAC-chained audit log, signed agent cards, per-artefact lineage, air-gap deploy. The orchestrator your compliance team will sign off on. https://bernstein.run
summaryZh: Audit-grade multi-agent orchestration for CLI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, +40 more). HMAC-chained audit log, signed agent cards, per-artefact lineage, air-gap deploy. The orchestrator your compliance team will sign off on. https://bernstein.run 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
